item.deadsun.loot_bag.desc: Right-click to open for random loot
config.deadsun.title: Dead Sun Config
config.deadsun.torchRadius.tooltip: How many blocks around a torch is safe from zombie spawns
config.deadsun.lootBagDropChance.tooltip: Chance for zombies to drop a loot bag (0.0 - 1.0)
config.deadsun.spawnDensity.tooltip: Maximum zombies that can exist near a player at once
config.deadsun.spawnRadius.tooltip: How far from the player zombies can spawn (in blocks)
config.deadsun.minSpawnDistance.tooltip: Minimum distance from the player for zombie spawns (in blocks)
config.deadsun.ticksBetweenSpawns.toolti: How often the game tries to spawn zombies (in ticks, 20 = 1 second)
config.deadsun.maxBlockLight.tooltip: Max block light level for zombies to spawn (-1 = ignore light)
config.deadsun.maxZombiesOverworld.toolt: Maximum total zombies in the overworld at once
config.deadsun.maxZombiesEnd.tooltip: Maximum total zombies in the End at once
config.deadsun.maxZombiesNether.tooltip: Maximum total zombies in the Nether at once
config.deadsun.groupSpawning.tooltip: Zombies spawn in groups instead of individually
config.deadsun.zombieLeap.tooltip: Zombies leap at players when close (sneaking prevents leap)
config.deadsun.zombiePileUp.tooltip: Zombies climb on each other when stuck
config.deadsun.leapStrength.tooltip: Horizontal speed of the zombie leap
config.deadsun.leapHeight.tooltip: Vertical speed of the zombie leap
config.deadsun.leapCooldown.tooltip: Ticks before a zombie can leap again (20 = 1 second)
config.deadsun.enderPearlChance.tooltip: Chance to get ender pearls from an End loot bag (0.0 - 1.0)
config.deadsun.daysBeforeActivation.tool: Number of in-game days before Dead Sun features activate (0 = always active)
config.deadsun.soundTracking.tooltip: Zombies pathfind toward sounds made by players (sneaking silences you)
config.deadsun.soundHearRange.tooltip: How far zombies can hear sounds (in blocks)
config.deadsun.soundDecayTime.tooltip: How long sounds persist before fading (in ticks, 20 = 1 second)
config.deadsun.lightTracking.tooltip: Zombies are attracted to light sources at night
config.deadsun.lightSearchRange.tooltip: How far zombies search for light sources (in blocks)
config.deadsun.lightMinBrightness.toolti: Minimum block brightness to attract zombies
config.deadsun.wanderingHordes.tooltip: Zombies periodically group up and wander toward random waypoints
config.deadsun.hordeFrequency.tooltip: How often hordes pick a new waypoint (in seconds)
config.deadsun.hordeRange.tooltip: How far hordes can wander from the player (in blocks)
config.deadsun.noisyZombies.tooltip: Zombies call out when near players, attracting others (requires line of sight, sneaking avoids detection)
config.deadsun.noisyZombieRange.tooltip: How far the noisy zombie call attracts other zombies (in blocks)
config.deadsun.noisyZombieCooldown.toolt: Ticks between noisy zombie calls (20 = 1 second)
